heading: COORDINATION OF FEDERAL INFORMATION POLICY
label: 35 COORDINATION OF FEDERAL INFORMATION POLICY
notes: CodificationThis chapter was originally added by , , , which act enacted this title, and was based on , , known as the Federal Reports Act of 1942, which was classified to sections 139 to 139f of former Title 5, transferred to chapter 12 (§ 421 et seq.) of former Title 44, and repealed by upon the enactment of this title. Subsequent to its original enactment by , this chapter was amended generally by and again by . As a result, this chapter is shown herein as having been added beginning with without reference to earlier amendatory laws. See Prior Provisions notes throughout this chapter.Pub.
